resultList.dtldesc: Fulfil your dream of investing in a lovely home to showcase your love for your family. Located in one of the prime residential areas of Gurukul, Ahmedabad, this 4BHK villa is up for sale and ideal to move in with your family. Property Specifications and FacilitiesThis villa, which is located on the G1 floor, offers you the opportunity to personalize it as it comes in an unfurnished condition. The villa is blessed with loads of natural light and the smooth flow of soft breeze across every nook of the flat is simply amazing. The ground floor has a bedroom with attached bathroom fitted with western toilet  geyser, a living room, a dining area, a kitchen with utility area and a pooja room. There are three bedrooms, two attached bathrooms with western toilets  geysers and a balcony linked to bedroom located on the first floor. A internal staircase links these two floors together. The vitrified floors keep the home cool during the summer and offer the home an expensive appearance. There is piped gas connection, exhaust fan and electrical fittings available. Amenities such as open parking space, 24 hours water supply, security guards and CCTVs are installed for the comfort of the residents. LocalityThe abode is conveniently located and enjoys smooth access to all the major parts of the city. Another highlight of this villa is the availability of all the means of public transport within sensible limits. You can easily get access to the BRTS, Gurukul Metro 1km, Kalupur Railway Station 8km and Sabarmati Railway Station 8km. Within a short 2km radius, there are numerous schools, malls, hospitals, shopping areas, banks, and ATMs.
